propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.inputs: Array<{ name: string, type: string, placeholder: string, required?: boolean, className?: string }> - Form input fields (min 2 required)
propsSchema.multiSelect?: { name: string, label: string, options: string[] } - Optional multi-select dropdown field
propsSchema.textarea?: { name: string, placeholder: string, rows?: number, required?: boolean, className?: string } - Optional textarea field
